name: No witnesses to forklift running over my foot at work, can I still claim?
description: Yes—use photos, medical, logs, experts; no witnesses not fatal.

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to forklift running over my foot at work, can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes—use photos, medical, logs, experts; no witnesses not fatal.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, medical records, photos, forklift damage, maintenance logs suffice.** Circumstantial evidence works.[1][4] Key factors: OSHA violations, operator statements prove negligence. Expert reconstructs scene. Attorney builds case without eyes.
